chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2977 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on office objection as at “A” 2. For orders on M.A. No.17599/2024 3. For hearing of bail application -------------------------------------------- 24.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- None present for applicant. Same was the position on the last two dates of hearings. Continuous absence of counsel for applicant shows that he has lost his interest to pursue the instant criminal bail application, therefore, it is dismissed on account of non-prosecution. However, trial Court is directed to conclude the trial, preferably within period of three months J U D G E Gulsher/PS z
